uiSpecs.label: Fetch Related Files (SFTP)
uiSpecs.tooltipText: Fetches companion files from SFTP based on regex patterns, bundles them into a ZIP archive with retry logic

sourceDirectory.title: Source Directory
sourceDirectory.description: Remote source directory to read from

fileFilterRegex.title: ListSFTP File Filter Regex
fileFilterRegex.description: Regex to match only FILE1 pattern on SFTP (e.g. TktCoupon_.*\.dat\.gpg)

file1Pattern.title: FILE1 File Pattern
file1Pattern.description: Regex with one capture group for shared token (e.g. ^TktCoupon_(.*)\.dat\.gpg$)

file2Pattern.title: FILE2 File Pattern
file2Pattern.description: Regex with same capture group structure (e.g. ^TktDocument_(.*)\.dat\.gpg$)

file3Pattern.title: FILE3 File Pattern
file3Pattern.description: Optional regex for a third companion file with same capture group structure

retryTimeoutHours.title: Retry Timeout Hours
retryTimeoutHours.description: Max hours to wait for companion files before giving up

outputZipNamePattern.title: Output ZIP Name Pattern
outputZipNamePattern.description: Pattern for output ZIP filename. Use {timestamp} placeholder

processedDirectory.title: Move Destination Directory
processedDirectory.description: SFTP directory to move files after processing

searchDirRecursively.title: Search Directory Recursively
searchDirRecursively.description: Search nested folders when listing files

advancedSection.title: Advanced Properties
advancedSection.description: Advanced properties for Fetch Related Files. Ensure you understand the impact before making changes.

uiSpecs.label: Decrypt Related Files
uiSpecs.tooltipText: Decrypts related files inside a ZIP archive (PGP or AES), auto-detects encryption and re-packages as ZIP

privateKeyPath.title: PGP Private Key File
privateKeyPath.description: Path to PGP private key file

passphrase.title: PGP Key Passphrase
passphrase.description: Passphrase for the PGP private key

aesPassword.title: AES Password
aesPassword.description: Password for AES decryption (only if encryption type is AES)

advancedSection.title: Advanced Properties
advancedSection.description: Advanced properties for Decrypt Related Files

uiSpecs.label: Join Related Files (SQL)
uiSpecs.tooltipText: Joins CSV/delimited files from a ZIP archive using SQLite SQL JOIN, outputs a single CSV file

joinQuery.title: SQL JOIN Query
joinQuery.description: SQL JOIN query. Tables named table1, table2, etc. alphabetically by filename (e.g. SELECT table1.*, table2.* FROM table1 INNER JOIN table2 ON table1.col = table2.col)

outputFilename.title: Output Filename
outputFilename.description: Output CSV filename. Supports NiFi Expression Language (e.g. merg_${now():format('yyyy-MM-dd')}.csv)

csvDelimiter.title: CSV Delimiter
csvDelimiter.description: Delimiter used in the CSV files (e.g. , or |)

advancedSection.title: Advanced Properties
advancedSection.description: Advanced properties for Join Related Files

uiSpecs.tooltipText: convert json to csv (JSON-to-CSV-Converter)

advancedSection.title: Advanced Properties
